mikhail-gorbachev.name: Mikhail Gorbachev
mikhail-gorbachev.description: Tried to fix the system but accidentally broke it. 🔨

boris-yeltsin.name: Boris Yeltsin
boris-yeltsin.description: Climbed on a tank and ended an empire. 🐻

union-preserved.title: Soviet Union 2.0 🇨🇳🔨
union-preserved.description: The USSR adopts Chinese-style reforms: capitalism without democracy.
union-preserved.present_day_status: The USSR is the world's largest economy. It is authoritarian but prosperous. The internet is heavily censored. 🔨💰

tiananmen-moscow.title: Crackdown in Moscow
tiananmen-moscow.description: Protests are crushed. The Party retains control.

cold-war-continues.consequence: Cold War continues but shifts to economics

violent-collapse.title: Red Storm ⚔️🔥
violent-collapse.description: The collapse turns into a civil war.
violent-collapse.divergence_description: The August Coup leads to a full civil war.
violent-collapse.present_day_status: Russia is a collection of warlord states. The UN patrols the nuclear sites. ☢️💀

civil-war-1991.title: The Second Russian Civil War
civil-war-1991.description: Hardliners vs. Democrats. Nukes go missing.

true-democracy.title: Nordic Russia ❄️🗳️
true-democracy.description: Russia transitions smoothly to a social democracy.
true-democracy.present_day_status: Russia is a wealthy social democracy and a key member of the European Union. 🇷🇺🇪🇺

grand-bargain.title: The Grand Bargain
grand-bargain.description: The West provides massive aid (Marshal Plan 2.0).

chernobyl.title: Chernobyl (1986)
chernobyl.text: Reactor 4 has exploded. Radiation is spewing across Europe. The West is asking questions. What do we say?

truth.text: Tell the full truth. Ask for help.
truth.consequence: Humiliating, but it starts "Glasnost". The people trust you.

lie.consequence: The lie poisons the system. The rot deepens.

berlin-wall.title: The Wall (1989)
berlin-wall.text: Protests in East Berlin. The people want to cross. The guards ask for orders. Open fire?

open.text: Do not shoot. Open the gates.
open.consequence: The Wall falls. The Cold War ends. Freedom!

shoot.consequence: Massacre. The West sanctions us. We become isolated like North Korea.

august-coup.title: The Coup (1991)
august-coup.text: Hardliners have seized power. Tanks are in Moscow. Yeltsin is on a tank calling for resistance.

join-yeltsin.consequence: The coup fails. The USSR dissolves efficiently.

support-coup.text: Support the Emergency Committee. Order first.
support-coup.consequence: The coup succeeds. The USSR is saved, but freedom is dead.
